_notes.status: DEFINITIVE — Stage 1 fixed-params run was conclusive. No Stage 2 needed.

provenance.DKN-Align: 0.9789 with default params — above SVC-RBF (0.9751). 7.3s/fold. No tuning required; model is already competitive.
provenance.DKN-AGOP: 0.7070 — catastrophic failure. Initial isotropic RFF at d=5000 is diluted by 480 noise dimensions; AGOP gradient is near-random; rank-100 projection points in uninformative directions. Not tunable.
provenance.DKN-RFM-Align: 0.4916 — below random. Anisotropic kernel is seeded from the same broken AGOP. Systematic label inversion suggests alignment found an adversarial local minimum. Not tunable.
provenance.SVC-RBF: 0.9751 with C=10.0 (from other datasets). Reasonable fixed default.
provenance.ML-SVM: 0.9037 — bottleneck effect clearly visible at d=5000.
provenance.conclusion: DKN-Align is the only proposed model competitive at this dimensionality. Beats SVC-RBF by 0.38pp using 3x less training time. DKN-AGOP and DKN-RFM-Align are structurally broken at d>>rank_of_signal.
